name: My Pasta Rabe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté until fragrant and onions are translucent.
2. Add mushrooms to the skillet; cook until they release their moisture and become tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Wash broccoli rabe thoroughly; chop into small pieces. Steam broccoli rabe in boiling water for 5 minutes or until just tender.
4. Drain the steamed broccoli rabe and add it to the skillet with the garlic mixture.
5. Add cooked linguini to the skillet and toss gently to combine.
6. Grate Parmesan or romano cheese over the pasta and mix well.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot.
8-9. Serve the pasta warm, garnished with additional grated cheese if desired.
